name: Individual Counterparty Data - Balance sheet
description_short: Granular balance sheet data for individual pension funds and insurance companies, showing assets, liabilities, and their breakdowns by instrument, maturity, and counterpart. Part of the ECB's insurance and pension statistics framework.
use_cases: What is the asset allocation of euro area pension funds?
How are insurance company portfolios distributed across asset classes?
What is the maturity structure of pension fund liabilities?
How do technical provisions of insurers compare across euro area countries?
